rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex blocks when the diagnostic indicates a missing EOF at 'annex'
Ensure all AGREE annex blocks are properly closed with a semicolon after the closing **
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex
Align helper declaration types with the expression types they represent
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool in declarations
Trace the first unresolved identifier or invalid helper declaration on the same line when encountering type-related errors
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Use proper AGREE scalar type names in declarations
Ensure all AGREE annex blocks are properly closed
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not add architecture to fix unresolved references; instead, trace and fix the root cause
Do not use invalid or undeclared identifiers in AGREE expressions
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
